content.text:
Analyzing the chart carefully by tracing each relationship line:

**Bottom (black lines - RH, KK, DP, VJ):**
- "RH + KK" starts ~2006, but I can see "DP + KK" labels appearing around 2008-2009 — this indicates a break in Ryan+Kelly's relationship when Kelly dated Darryl.
- After the break: RH+KK resumes ~2009→2013 ≈ 4 years

**Middle-green lines (Me = Pam, RA):**
- "Me + RA" (Pam + Roy) is visible early (2005→2006/2007), then breaks
- "Me + JH" (Pam + Jim) starts around 2008 and continues unbroken through 2013 ≈ 5 years

**Other relationships:**
- MS+JL: brief, ~2007-2008
- JH+KF: very brief, ~2007
- DS+AM: on/off with breaks
- AB+AM, AB+EH: shorter periods

<think>
The longest unbroken relationship in the chart is "Me + JH" (Pam Beesly + Jim Halpert), starting around 2008 and continuing straight through to 2013 — approximately 5 continuous years. Ryan + Kelly (RH+KK) has a break in the middle when Kelly dated Darryl (DP+KK visible around 2008-2009), so their longest unbroken segment is only ~4 years. All other relationships are shorter or have clear breaks.
</think>

<answer>
Me + JH (Pam Beesly and Jim Halpert), who maintained a continuous relationship from approximately 2008 through 2013 (~5 years) without any breakup in between.
</answer>
